name: com.unitycoder.editors
description: 为 Unity 提供 Visual Studio Code 及其变体（Cursor、Antigravity、Trae、Trae CN、Kiro、Qoder、Lingma、Windsurf）的代码编辑器集成支持。添加对生成 csproj 文件以实现智能提示、自动发现安装等功能。

_upm.changelog:
Initial release:

- Support for Visual Studio Code and popular variants (Cursor, Antigravity, Trae, Trae CN, Kiro, Qoder, Lingma, Windsurf)
- Automatic discovery of editor installations
- Project file generation (.csproj and .sln)
- Manual path specification with automatic version detection
- Excludes Visual Studio auto-discovery
